final:
module decoder_3to8(
    input en,
    input [2:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] y
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (en) begin
            y = 8'b00000001 << d;
        end else begin
            y = 8'b00000000;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y = 8'b11111111;
    end
  end

endmodule
